perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action close-up shot of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a purple tank top, lying on a bed or soft surface. She looks directly at the camera with a surprised facial expression, resting her chin on her hand. (2) She shifts her hand to her cheek and begins pouting slightly while speaking, her eyes moving as she expresses emotion. (3) She continues talking, maintaining the close-up perspective with subtle head tilts and varied facial expressions reflecting frustration and humor.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking in a high-pitched, slightly excited tone; an upbeat, mid-tempo acoustic-style background music starts. (2) A 'hm?' questioning sound effect plays briefly as the woman's speech pattern pauses; the music continues at a steady volume. (3) The female voice continues with a complaining yet humorous tone until the end of the clip, with quiet indoor ambient noise in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook: '天啊' (Oh my god) appearing in white and black text. (2) Functional Text: '我發現在新加坡 真的很難 交到男朋友欸' (I found it's really hard to get a boyfriend in Singapore) in yellow and white, expressing a personal discovery. (3) Functional Text: '因為不想要 交網絡上的嘛 比較想要交 現實中的' (Because I don't want to meet someone online, I want to meet in reality) and '可是現實中 妳在外面 那些男生 他們都在 看手機 他根本不看我' (But in reality, when you're out, those guys are all looking at their phones, he doesn't look at me at all) expressing frustration.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in a close-up shot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long dark hair, wearing a purple spaghetti-strap tank top and a thin necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain indoor setting, likely a bedroom, with beige or off-white bedding visible.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Personal Observation -> Justification -> Irony
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic social commentary vlog where the creator shares her struggle of finding a boyfriend in Singapore. She expresses a preference for meeting people in real life rather than online, but notes the irony that men in public are too preoccupied with their phones to notice her. The combination of pouting facial expressions, upbeat music, and relatable dating complaints aims to engage a social media audience through humor and empathy.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Close-up selfie-style pouting while talking about dating.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on text overlays to emphasize emotional beats and the core complaint about modern dating culture.
